description: Build a SortingAnalyzer from a sorting + preprocessed recording, compute waveforms/templates/correlograms/unit-locations and quality metrics (snr, isi_violations_ratio, presence_ratio, amplitude_cutoff, firing_rate, amplitude_cv, sliding_rp_violation), then apply threshold-based curation labels (good/mua/noise).
rules: loads sorting from SORTING_DIR/sorting and recording from PREPROCESSED_DIR/preprocessed
CURATION is one of allen | ibl | strict
writes analyzer/, quality_metrics.csv, and curation_labels.json under record_store
captures the run log to record_store/metrics_report.txt
degrades gracefully (still writes the report, exit 0) when spikeinterface is absent
usage: Set SORTING_DIR (dir with a 'sorting' subfolder) and PREPROCESSED_DIR (dir with a 'preprocessed' subfolder); optional CURATION (default allen). Output: metrics_report.txt + quality_metrics.csv + curation_labels.json.
limitation: Requires spikeinterface (+ pandas). Read-only over inputs; writes only to record_store. Threshold curation is a starting point, not a verdict.
